name: Nizhny Novgorod Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: courage and the historic banners of the Russian principalities
the hooves and antlers of the deer

description: A white field charged in the centre with the historic red walking stag with black hooves and antlers, taken from the coat of arms of Nizhny Novgorod.
history: Adopted in 2006 by the Legislative Assembly of Nizhny Novgorod Oblast; the central charge is the historic deer emblem of the city of Nizhny Novgorod.

features.symbolism: white represents nobility and purity, drawn from the heraldry of the Nizhny Novgorod arms.
a red walking stag with black hooves and antlers, the historic heraldic emblem of Nizhny Novgorod since the 16th century.
